lobby_cta: Claim your game - enter the code in the app
ts: Open the Game tab in the app
lobby_phone_cta: Enter the code from the TV
deploy_place_unit: Place your unit on the map.
battle_roll_dice: roll the dice on your phone!
cancel_game: Do you really want to end the battle?
pick_units: Select and place a unit on the battlefield.
bonus_unit_advantage: {name} gained the Circle of Strength advantage by choosing the unit.
bonus_loc_advantage: {name} gained the Terrain advantage by choosing a favorable position.
bonus_loc_disadvantage: {name} has the Terrain disadvantage due to an unfavorable position.
minigame_initiative: {name}, you can gain an additional attack bonus! Approach the TV and play the mini-game. Good luck!
minigame_initiative2: {name}, you can gain an additional attack bonus! Approach the TV and play the mini-game. Good luck!
minigame_def_cta: {name}, you can gain an additional defense bonus! Approach the TV and play the mini-game. Good luck!
minigame_dmg_fail: {name} did not gain an attack bonus.
minigame_def_fail: {name} did not gain a defense bonus.
battle_attack_success: {name}'s attack succeeded with a roll of {roll}
battle_attack_failure: {name}'s attack failed with a roll of {roll}
battle_defense_success: {name}'s defense succeeded with a roll of {roll}
battle_defense_failure: {name}'s defense failed with a roll of {roll}
battle_unit_retry: {name} uses Circle of Strength and can attack again!
intro: Select and place your unit on the map!
intro_1:
The landscape of frozen ponds and raw reeds is gripped by an impenetrable icy fog, through which the outlines of the Telnitz granaries can barely be seen. The damp cold creeps under your nails, and in the valley of the Golden Stream, the smell of mud mingles with the sharp north wind in complete silence.

Select and then place your unit, General.
intro_2:
The slopes of Pratzen Hill rise between fields and narrow paths; the Chapel of St. Anthony and the surrounding buildings are outlined in the morning light. The steep hillside and stone terraces create landmarks, with views over the wide surroundings.

Select and then place your unit, General.
intro_3:
Rows of bare bushes and low stone walls stretch along the slopes of the Old Vineyards. The slopes are steep and rugged, with narrow paths and uneven terrain that naturally shape the direction of advance. Every step could be decisive.

Select and then place your unit, General.
onboarding_1:
1. Three Engagements:

The battle consists of three engagements: for Sokolnitz and Telnitz, for Pratzen Heights, and for the Old Vineyards. The overall winner is the one who controls at least two of them.
onboarding_2:
2. Units and the Circle of Strength:

You have Infantry, Cavalry, and Artillery at your disposal. Each can be deployed only once. They work on the principle of the Circle of Strength:

Cavalry crushes Artillery (swift charge into the rear).
Artillery batters Infantry (long-range fire into the ranks).
Infantry stops Cavalry (bayonets and tight formations).
onboarding_3:
3. Terrain:

Place your unit on the map. Favorable terrain adds 1 point to your strength, unfavorable terrain deducts 1.
onboarding_4:
4. Bonuses:

In the exhibition you could collect three types of bonuses: Weapons (attack), Cuirass (defense), and Bandages (extra life). Distribute them strategically across all three engagements.
onboarding_5:
5. Mini-game:

Before each engagement you will play a mini-game for an additional attack or defense advantage.
onboarding_6:
6. The Decisive Battle:

The game tallies all bonuses and sets a target number you must exceed to succeed. Fighting continues until one of you strikes the opponent and seizes the battlefield. Good luck!
